Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0B6F "1942-MUSICV2-0B6F" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "1942 (Music v2).prg"
Metadata.Notes: This is the Encore re-release which has different music to the original Elite version.
